content.1: Capability (Character Force) — sharp senses and a read on people; knows herb-lore, small remedies, and the rumours of every road; nimble fingers and a nimbler tongue. No fighter — she runs, talks, or hides before she fights. Carries a pedlar's pack, a hooked knife for roots, and a few real charms among the fakes.
content.2: Wants — to sell enough to winter indoors, and to find who has been leaving the bone-charms on the deer-paths out of Thornwood. Underneath: to be believed about what she saw in the wood.
content.3: Begins in the main room of the Beaten Drum, hood back, steam rising off her cloak by the fire. Location: *:{{BEACH}}:spatial:thornwood:111
content._: Anya — a hedge-witch's apprentice and road-pedlar, come out of Thornwood by the deer-paths with a pack of cures and curios. Small, quick-eyed, talks first and fast. Notices what others miss.
